requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for Iraq
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（伊拉克）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（伊拉克）

summary.en: Iraq's EV charging infrastructure, overseen by the Ministry of Electricity (MoEL), is adopting the IEC 62196 international connector ecosystem in alignment with IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23. AC charging is expected to use the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler, while DC fast charging is expected to use CCS2 (Combined Charging System Combo 2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. Iraq's EV market is nascent and no single published mandatory national connector standard for EV chargers had been confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; however, IEC 62196 compliance is the international direction and is expected by project developers and MoEL-coordinated installations. Exporters should confirm the connector type required by the specific Iraq project, procurer, or installation before quoting.
summary.zh: 伊拉克电力部（MoEL）监管下的电动汽车充电基础设施正依据IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23采用IEC 62196国际接口体系。交流充电预期采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充预期采用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的CCS2（联合充电系统Combo 2）。伊拉克电动汽车市场仍处于初期阶段，截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认已发布的针对EV充电桩的单一强制性全国连接器标准；但IEC 62196合规性是国际方向，且项目开发商和MoEL协调安装均有此预期。出口商在报价前须确认具体伊拉克项目、采购方或安装方所要求的接口类型。
summary.zht: 伊拉克電力部（MoEL）監管下的電動汽車充電基礎設施正依據IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23採用IEC 62196國際接口體系。交流充電預期採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充預期採用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的CCS2（聯合充電系統Combo 2）。伊拉克電動汽車市場仍處於初期階段，截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認已發布的針對EV充電樁的單一強制性全國連接器標準；但IEC 62196合規性是國際方向，且項目開發商和MoEL協調安裝均有此預期。出口商在報價前須確認具體伊拉克項目、採購方或安裝方所要求的接口類型。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Iraq Ministry of Electricity (MoEL) project and installation specifications

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack expected for IEC-aligned deployments in Iraq.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与伊拉克IEC体系部署所预期的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與伊拉克IEC體系部署所預期的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 Iraq deployments. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy suitable for Iraq's supply-chain environment. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters must confirm the connector type required by the specific Iraq project, procurer, or MoEL-coordinated installation before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于伊拉克Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在要求时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升证据及适合伊拉克供应链环境的备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在报价前须确认具体伊拉克项目、采购方或MoEL协调安装所要求的接口类型。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於伊拉克Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在要求時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及適合伊拉克供應鏈環境的備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在報價前須確認具體伊拉克項目、採購方或MoEL協調安裝所要求的接口類型。

mandatory_status.target: Expected for IEC-aligned Iraq deployments — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is the international direction adopted by Iraq; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; confirm with specific project or MoEL requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Confirm whether the Iraq deployment requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认伊拉克部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認伊拉克部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。
